name: docker_build_push
description: Builds a Docker image from a Dockerfile in the project and pushes it to a specified container registry. Assumes Docker is installed and user is logged into the registry.

project_path.description: The root directory path of the project containing the Dockerfile.

dockerfile_path.description: Path to the Dockerfile, relative to project_path. Defaults to 'Dockerfile'.

image_name.description: The name for the Docker image (e.g., 'myusername/my-app').

image_tag.description: The tag for the Docker image (e.g., 'v1.0.0', 'latest'). Defaults to 'latest'.

registry_url.description: Optional URL of the container registry. If not provided, defaults to Docker Hub. For other registries like GCR or ECR, this is required (e.g., 'gcr.io/my-project').

build_args.description: Optional build-time variables (ARG) to pass to the Docker build command.

push_image.description: If true (default), pushes the image after a successful build. If false, only builds the image.

hints.description: This tool is destructive as it builds a Docker image and potentially overwrites an existing tag in a registry. Not idempotent.
